subcodes.first_line: O thou who art wise! That which thou didst write and possess was the word of the truthful ones and the story of the servants of the glorious Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هوشیار آنچه نگاشتی و داشتی سخن راستان بود و داستان بندگان آستان بزرگوار
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @symbolism of color and light
